svg.title: North Haven, Connecticut Street Map
svg.desc: 444 named roads drawn from CT DOT centerlines plus 45 Census-geocoder fallback roads. 393 match the 404-name April 28, 2020 North Haven street list.
svg.text: 444 named roads drawn from CT DOT centerlines plus 45 Census-geocoder fallback roads. 393 match the 404-name April 28, 2020 North Haven street list.

Road geometry: CT DOT centerlines, with Census-geocoder fallbacks for some missing official streets. Area demographics: 2020-2024 ACS 5-year block-group estimates. Street-name list source: North Haven voting district street list printed April 28, 2020.
Hover in a browser for street names. A few street-list entries are not present in the geometry source.
